title: eragrostis usambarensis
intro: Eragrostis usambarensis, also known as the East African love grass, is a species of grass native to East Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis usambarensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infection, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis usambarensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by boiling or steeping the leaves and stems in water or a solvent.
